user_task_description: This deck feels visually inconsistent from slide to slide.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Make the slide styling consistent across the deck, including titles, body text, and card appearance.
atomic_scope: Only style consistency is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with consistent styling across slides.

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- Inconsistency appears across multiple style dimensions at once
- The deck is not completely broken, so the agent must normalize rather than redesign from scratch
- The request is global rather than local
